title: Opening an Account
scene: 你刚到美国，去银行开支票账户。

turns.cn: 您好，今天需要什么服务？
turns.en: Hello. How can I help you today?

turns.cn: 我想开一个支票账户。
turns.en: I'd like to open a checking account.

turns.cn: 请出示护照和地址证明。
turns.en: I'll need your passport and proof of address.

turns.cn: 这是我的租房合同，可以吗？
turns.en: Here's my lease agreement. Will that work?

turns.cn: 可以。最低存款二十五美元。
turns.en: Yes. The minimum deposit is twenty-five dollars.

turns.cn: 有月费吗？
turns.en: Is there a monthly fee?

turns.cn: 学生账户免月费，这是您的借记卡。
turns.en: Student accounts have no monthly fee. Here's your debit card.

title: ATM Problem
scene: 你的卡被取款机吞了，进银行求助。

turns.cn: 你好，我的卡卡在ATM里了。
turns.en: Hi, my card got stuck in the ATM.

turns.cn: 哪一台？什么时候的事？
turns.en: Which machine? When did it happen?

turns.cn: 门口那台，大概十分钟前。
turns.en: The one by the entrance, about ten minutes ago.

turns.cn: 我查一下……卡已经取出来了。
turns.en: Let me check. We've already retrieved it.

turns.cn: 钱有扣吗？我取了两百。
turns.en: Was any money deducted? I was withdrawing two hundred.

turns.cn: 没有扣款，您可以重新取。
turns.en: No charge went through. You can try again.

turns.cn: 谢谢，吓死我了。
turns.en: Thanks. That was scary!

title: Wire Transfer
scene: 你要往国内汇款，咨询手续费。

turns.cn: 我想电汇五千美元到中国。
turns.en: I need to wire five thousand dollars to China.

turns.cn: 请填写收款人姓名和银行信息。
turns.en: Please fill in the recipient's name and bank details.

turns.cn: 手续费多少？几天到账？
turns.en: What's the fee, and how long does it take?

turns.cn: 手续费四十五，三到五个工作日。
turns.en: Forty-five dollars, three to five business days.

turns.cn: 汇率按今天的算吗？
turns.en: Is the exchange rate based on today's rate?

turns.cn: 对，按处理时的实时汇率。
turns.en: Yes, the rate at the time of processing.

turns.cn: 好的，请帮我办理。
turns.en: Okay, please go ahead.

title: Lost Debit Card
scene: 你丢了借记卡，打电话挂失。

turns.cn: 银行客服，请问有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Bank customer service. How may I help you?

turns.cn: 我的借记卡丢了，需要挂失。
turns.en: I lost my debit card and need to report it.

turns.cn: 请提供您的姓名和卡号后四位。
turns.en: May I have your name and the last four digits of the card?

turns.cn: 张伟，后四位是8823。
turns.en: Zhang Wei, last four digits are 8823.

turns.cn: 卡已冻结，新卡五到七天寄到。
turns.en: The card is now frozen. A new one will arrive in five to seven days.

turns.cn: 这期间能用手机银行吗？
turns.en: Can I still use mobile banking in the meantime?

turns.cn: 可以，转账和缴费不受影响。
turns.en: Yes, transfers and bill pay still work.

title: Depositing a Check
scene: 你拿到工资支票，到银行柜台存入账户。

turns.cn: 你好，我想存一张支票。
turns.en: Hi, I'd like to deposit a check.

turns.cn: 存到哪个账户？请填背面并签字。
turns.en: Which account? Please endorse the back and sign it.

turns.cn: 支票账户，全部存入。
turns.en: My checking account, the full amount.

turns.cn: 一千二百美元，今天能到账一部分。
turns.en: Twelve hundred dollars. Part of it may be available today.

turns.cn: 全部到账要多久？
turns.en: How long until the full amount clears?

turns.cn: 通常两个工作日，手机银行可查进度。
turns.en: Usually two business days. You can track it in mobile banking.

turns.cn: 好的，需要收据吗？
turns.en: Okay. Could I have a receipt?

title: Credit Card Application
scene: 你在银行申请第一张信用卡。

turns.cn: 想办哪种卡？我们有返现和旅行积分。
turns.en: Which card interests you? We have cash back and travel rewards.

turns.cn: 日常消费返现那种，年费多少？
turns.en: The cash-back one for everyday spending. What's the annual fee?

turns.cn: 首年免年费，之后九十五，消费够可免。
turns.en: No fee the first year, then ninety-five unless you spend enough to waive it.

turns.cn: 需要什么材料？多久能批？
turns.en: What do I need to apply, and how long for approval?

turns.cn: 身份证、收入证明，网上几分钟，卡一周寄到。
turns.en: ID and proof of income. Online takes minutes; the card arrives in a week.

turns.cn: 信用额度大概多少？
turns.en: What credit limit should I expect?

turns.cn: 根据收入，新客一般三千到五千。
turns.en: Based on income, new customers often get three to five thousand.
